programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The debt collection agents grapple with emotional evictions and moral dilemmas during the festive period, including a young family in Crystal Palace who are made homeless when the landlord repossesses their home because he wants to redevelop the property. The eviction comes as a shock to the family as they are up to date with their rent, but have just one hour to gather their belongings. Plus, an acrimonious divorce in Chessington comes to a head when the estranged wife obtains a writ to reclaim the house, and an off-licence owner in Hampshire with unpaid rent of more than £5,000 battles to keep his business open just as everything shuts down for the holidays(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ian Buchanan, Rebecca Staab, Deidre Hall and Alan Scarfe(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Navy commander's wife, determining whether it is linked to her role as a therapist, or an act of terrorism since her husband's name has appeared on a Jihadist's target list. Elsewhere, the group discusses Halloween costumes, as well as Tony's recent dating habits. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers a fraudulent charity that preys on those searching for missing military personnel while investigating the murder of a retired Master Sergeant. Meanwhile, Bishop agonises over the results of her probation evaluation, and Tony contemplates adopting a stray cat that followed him home. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the cause of a hit-and-run incident in which a Petty Officer has been killed. Meanwhile, Gibbs works to clear a Navy Hospital Corpsman who has been indicted for illegally providing medical aid to victims of the crash, despite the injured insisting her techniques helped save their lives. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Warner attend the scene after assistant district attorney Page Ferguson falls to her death from the top of a multi-storey car park. Warner examines the body and initially concludes that the victim had been raped and cut with a knife, while Benson learns that she was leading a unit that prosecuted a gang of drug dealers - the head of which recently started a prison sentence due to her work(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A team investigates a young French model's claim that, after being brought to New York on a billionaire's private jet, she was raped by him at his 50th birthday party. The girl reveals there was another youngster on the plane, so Benson and Stabler try to trace the whereabouts of the potential witness(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are appalled to discover that students at Westmore University watched a live internet broadcast of a woman being raped and never contacted the police. Another live stream is discovered showing the victim in an abandoned building begging for help, and when the detectives manage to trace the address they find a link to an abduction case that is still unsolved(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A gruesome work of art in a painter's studio leads to the discovery of a woman's body in the flat above. Benson and Stabler investigate the victim's personal contacts and establish she could have suffered bullying at the wine business she co-founded. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A couple confront a businessman who is trying to break into their car, only to discover he has been stabbed. Benson and Stabler are forced to go undercover in a modern-day swingers club, posing as a married couple but in reality seeking information about possible suspects. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Dawson is taken aback when she receives a letter that turns out to be a suicide note, and despite probably being too late to stop them, she sets out to find the writer to intervene. Boden is unsettled by some shocking news, and Severide secretly looks into Dave's backstory to find out how the former firefighter's life went awry. Drama, starring Monica Raymund, Eamonn Walker and Taylor Kinney(n)

programme.title: Chicago Fire

With the city in chaos, it's all hands on deck to save as many people as possible and prevent further disaster. The firefighters have never encountered such carnage and, when it emerges one of their own is missing in the blast, there's no question that work and life as they know it will be changed forever(n)

The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Double Shock (1973)
programme.desc: A wealthy man due to marry a younger woman is electrocuted in the bath. Columbo suspects the victim's identical twin nephews - a flamboyant TV chef and a conservative banker - who stand to inherit his fortune if he died unmarried, but the detective is unsure which of them is the guilty party. Drama, starring Peter Falk, and Martin Landau in a dual role. With Paul Stewart, Julie Newmar and Jeanette Nolan(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Playback (1975)
programme.desc: An inventor tries to stop his mother-in-law from exposing his infidelities by murdering her in front of a security camera - and tampering with the recording to make it look like the killing occurred at a time when he had an alibi. However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An enigmatic killer shoots dead a businessman spending Thanksgiving at a hotel in the city, then takes his glasses, jewellery and ID to Washington Dulles airport, which has been brought to a stand-still by a massive snowstorm. As the murderer's actions take effect, a terror alert is issued, leaving all northern US airports in a state of panic, and leaving it up to DiNozzo, Bishop and her husband - all of whom are trapped at Dulles by the weather - to bring the armed villain to justice. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherley(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee deals with his father's recent death by writing him a letter outlining the details of his latest investigation. The case involved tracking down a hactivist collective known as Krampus, who were thought to have been responsible for an incident in which the internet crashed all over Washington, DC. McGee and Abby brought in three known cyber-terrorists for questioning, and discover evidence that links the trio to an attempted breach of the Congress e-mail server and archive. However, when this line of inquiry reaches a dead-end, the team picks up a new lead that suggests an isolated hacker from Wisconsin may be responsible. This 'lone wolf' scenario does not seem plausible to McGee, though, as he recalls a lesson his late father taught him. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate the murder of a teenage violinist who has been pushed to her death at a prestigious concert hall. Believing an arrogant opera conductor is the most likely suspect, they focus their inquiries on him - until a medical report changes everything and takes the case in an unexpected new direction. Julian Sands and Alice Krige guest star(n)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Four seemingly unrelated individuals are killed in a controlled bombing at a Pasadena restaurant, but as the NCIS officers dig deeper, they discover a link between the victims - all were members of an experimental strategy game developed by the Office of Naval Intelligence. The question is, who wanted them dead - and why? Chris O'Donnell and LL Cool J star(n)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A hit-and-run driver kills a man working on the campaign for an aspiring senator, but it soon becomes a case of national security when closer examination of the video footage makes it clear he was murdered. The agents' job is to figure out whether it is an isolated incident or part of a politically motivated plot that might put others in danger - and most of the pressure is on Kensi, who takes the victim's old job and goes undercover in the campaign office(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Chicago Fire

programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the suspicious death of a reality TV contestant. programme.desc: The body of a female jogger is found in a park, and detectives Briscoe and Green discover she was mauled to death by a pit-bull terrier. programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an alleyway, and the detectives discover he shined shoes for a living. They begin by looking for his most recent customers, and learn the victim was a Vietnam war veteran, shedding light on possible motives and suspects(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. programme.title: King Alfred and the Anglo-Saxons
programme.desc: Historian and broadcaster Michael Wood tells the story of King Alfred the Great, arguing that he and his descendants were England's most influential and important rulers. In the first of three programmes, the presenter details a desperate guerrilla war in Somerset, and establishes how Alfred laid the foundations for a single kingdom of 'all the English'. Filmed in locations including Reading and Rome, with contributions by leading scholars(n)

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: Documentary about the characters who live and work in the area of central London, which is famous for being the most coveted square on the Monopoly board and is home to Claridge's hotel and Christie's auction house. The film reveals a world of surprises and deep contrasts, including an estate agent selling multimillion-pound mansions, cafe owners hanging on to their livelihoods by their fingernails, an NHS doctor whose patients range from billionaires to people on benefits, an upmarket resident who dresses in Victorian clothing and a cabbie living in social housing(n)

programme.title: The One That Got Away (1957)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War adventure about a German pilot who repeatedly escaped from British prison camps. Transferred to Montreal, he managed to break out and cross the border into America in a bid to rejoin his squadron. Starring Hardy Kruger, Michael Goodliffe, Colin Gordon and Terence Alexander(n)

programme.title: The Stuarts in Exile
programme.desc: Part two of two. Dr Clare Jackson reveals how the Jacobite campaign took place on a European-wide stage, rather than purely Scottish, and inspired a nexus of international intrigue and covert plots. Jackson explores why so many law-abiding Scots and English were prepared to support the Catholic Stuarts and how the new Protestant Hanoverian regime hung by a thread, as George I and II struggled to impose their authority on frequently hostile and anti-European subjects(n)

programme.title: For the Love of Ada (1972)
programme.desc: A pensioner goes to great lengths to celebrate her wedding anniversary. Comedy, based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Irene Handl and Wilfred Pickles(n)

programme.title: Saturday Night Out (1963)
programme.desc: Five sailors spend their overnight leave in London, where they get involved with a variety of unusual characters. Drama, starring Bernard Lee, Heather Sears and John Bonney(n)

programme.title: Food Junkies
programme.desc: Shemzy selects his favourite moments from the series that cuts straight to the core of London's food scene(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a second home abroad(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a second home abroad(n)

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital(n)

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Primary School
programme.desc: One-off edition of the documentary charting life at Gascoigne Primary School in Barking, east London, this time during the hectic build-up to Christmas. The pupils of Year 2 have been given the challenge of putting on the nativity play, while kitchen manager Mary has the unenviable job of preparing for the biggest meal of the year for nearly a thousand hungry children, with a wide variety of cultural and dietary requirements to be satisfied. Teachers try to improve the lot of 10-year-old Taylor, who fears almost everything about the big school and newly qualified teacher James struggles to help seven-year-old Faisal, the only child at Gascoigne with Down's syndrome(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Dr Saleyha Ahsan investigates the signs and symptoms of depression, asking what people should look out for, Michael Mosley reveals a new discovery that could help improve people's eyesight, and Dr Chris van Tulleken carries out an experiment with the University of Worcester to find out the pros and cons of going gluten-free. Surgeon Gabriel Weston witnesses a breakthrough that could cure rheumatoid arthritis and other autoimmune diseases(n)

programme.title: Traders: Millions by the Minute
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary going inside the fast and fiercely competitive world of financial trading, meeting the men and women who play the markets in big cities around the world. New York-based Karen juggles two sets of twins, a busy social calendar and a $200million hedge fund. Bob has spent more than three decades jostling for position on Chicago's cattle futures trading floor, while London day traders Will and Piers use their expertise to train others in the art of making money from tiny moves in the markets. Narrated by Saskia Reeves(n)

programme.title: Queensbury Boxing League
programme.desc: Boxers battle it out over three, four and five two minute rounds against opponents - the most successful competitors will earn the right to challenge for the coveted Queensbury British title(n)

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: First of four dramas telling the stories of people facing life-changing decisions in a world where even the smallest choices are a luxury. Carol is a tough single mother striving to keep her family together. But when her teenage sons commit a random act of violence that ends in the death of a stranger, will she protect them or do the right thing? Starring Olivia Colman, Neil Maskell, Sarah Hoare and Billy and JJ Pamphilon(n)
